subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in God! In the Manifest Book it is revealed: "Perchance thy Lord will raise thee to a praiseworthy station." The praiseworthy station hath been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بالله در کتاب مبین عسی ان یبعثک ربک مقاما محمودا نازل مقام محمود را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
